curation.synopsis: This omnibus collects Rob Sanders' two short Adeptus Mechanicus novels, Skitarius and Tech-Priest, into a single campaign arc. On the corrupted forge world of Velchanos Magna, the cybernetic soldier Haldron-44 Stroika leads his skitarii through the wreckage of war while his master, Magos Omnid Torquora, directs the larger conquest from orbit. Together the two stories chart a single war from the mud of the front line to the cold arithmetic of high command, pitting the faithful of the Machine God against the Iron Warriors and the daemon-touched horrors of the Dark Mechanicum. Titan Legions march, robots awaken, and treachery festers, in a portrait of a war machine that runs on devotion as much as on oil and ammunition.

collects.basis: Adeptus Mechanicus omnibus follows Skitarius and Tech-Priest
